## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the bug:

```python
import syntect

ss = syntect.SyntaxSet.load_defaults(False)
ts = syntect.ThemeSet.load_defaults()
# ... reproduction code ...
```

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11, 3.12]
- syntect-py version: [e.g., 5.3.0]
- syntect version: [e.g., 5.3.0]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the bug here (stack traces, screenshots, etc.).
